name: balanced
summary: Middle-of-the-road autonomy — Claude writes freely within the project but requires approval for network, secrets, git push, destructive git, and shell commands matching a denylist.
when_to_use: Default for day-to-day feature work on a project you trust the test suite on.
memory_rules: Save every design decision via engram mem_save.
Always call mem_session_summary before declaring done.
